title: Tunisian Tagine Delight
description: A fragrant and flavorful dish that showcases the unique flavors of Tunisia. This recipe is perfect for a warm evening meal.
instructions: Heat the Grassy Olive Oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped Gooey Apricots and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the Tunisian Spices and cook for another minute.
Add the chopped Shiso Leaves and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fresh Leafy Spinach and cook until wilted.
Pour in the Tagine Broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with additional Shiso Leaves if desired.
